Name: EXAMPLE - delete on first real entry
Attribution: Required: credit 'J. Doe' in the game credits
Notes: Binary/large-asset provenance registry (process-options.md 'Binary assets', process.md §8). One row per unavoidably-binary asset the project ships. Refs back-link the SR/LLR it realizes; trace.py integrity-checks the ASSET- id only (like PART/PB). Provenance=human-made|ai-generated|mixed (distribution platforms like Steam require AI-content disclosure). License = SPDX id or 'proprietary'; Attribution states any required credit; ContractRef links the voice-actor release / commission agreement. Location is a pointer (git-LFS path or out-of-repo store URL); Hash + Version make the pointer verifiable even though the asset itself can't be diffed. The ideal-not-requirement stance: track ABOUT the asset in text even when the asset can't be. Optional, off-spine like interfaces.csv/PB — a project with no binary assets ignores this file; a leftover ASSET-000 never blocks a gate.
